manualTrialNote: Executed via Prisma service-layer direct calls (NOT a real browser session). User's K28-B spec asked for browser validation. Service-layer calls exercise the same business logic the HTTP routes use but do not validate UI rendering, navigation, cookie auth, or human interaction. A real browser trial is recommended before final production sign-off. See 'knownLimitations' for details.

knownLimitations: METHODOLOGY NOTE: K28-B 'manual trial' was executed via Prisma direct service-layer calls, not a real browser session. The user's original K28-B spec asked for browser validation. The trial driver called the same service functions the HTTP routes import — this is a partial substitute that validates business logic and invariants but does NOT validate UI rendering, navigation, cookie auth, or human interaction patterns. A real browser trial (npm run dev, navigate to /login, perform steps 5.1–5.8 manually) is recommended before final production sign-off.

recommendedDefaultAction: The USER → ADMIN adjustment request approval flow is READY_FOR_REAL_USE. Real users can now: submit adjustment requests, see them in /my-adjustment-requests, and have them reviewed by ADMIN via /admin/adjustment-requests. Approve creates official ScheduleAdjustment with full audit trail.
